strategy_notes: top10k mirror: template core (Salah 92% top-10k EO, Palmer, Isak, Mbeumo, Saka, VVD/Robertson Liverpool double-up) plus calculated differentials (Mateta 6.8%, Rogers 4.1%, Wood). CAPTAIN SALAH over Haaland: news-desk and fixture-room confirm Man City heavy rotation with Haaland OMITTED from the GW38 squad — captaining him is a rank-disaster trap that the field walks into. Salah is confirmed to start his Liverpool farewell away at relegated Ipswich (FDR 1), leads sim-lab on EV (7.17) and haul prob (0.385), and is the single biggest rank-protection pick at ~52% top-10k captaincy. Haaland excluded from the squad entirely given the confirmed omission; budget redeployed into Isak + a 3-4-3 attack and a Liverpool defensive double-up chasing the Ipswich clean sheet. Gabriel and Munoz benched behind nailed defenders — Gabriel carries a 75% flag plus Arsenal UCL-final rotation, so he is held for template EO but not started. Vice Mbeumo (home FDR 2, pens, zero rotation risk) is the safe armband fallback. No chip: single GW, no DGW, and elevated final-day rotation make Bench Boost / Triple Captain low-EV and high-variance; a clean non-chip game best protects a top-10k rank.
